## Meeting Purpose

[Handoff meeting for Aftershoot client, discussing current challenges and strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/UPAJ-ZGoGjHEsibYrfH92c3HR3dQ86xA?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Client is highly detail-oriented, slowing down content production (5-6 blog posts/month)](https://fathom.video/share/UPAJ-ZGoGjHEsibYrfH92c3HR3dQ86xA?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Multiple stakeholders (4+) involved, causing approval delays and strategy misalignment](https://fathom.video/share/UPAJ-ZGoGjHEsibYrfH92c3HR3dQ86xA?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [Contract shortened from 12 to 9 months; client plans to hire head of content in 6-12 months](https://fathom.video/share/UPAJ-ZGoGjHEsibYrfH92c3HR3dQ86xA?tab=summary&timestamp=369.0)
  - [Team switched from Content OS to Google Sheets for client preference](https://fathom.video/share/UPAJ-ZGoGjHEsibYrfH92c3HR3dQ86xA?tab=summary&timestamp=941.0)

## Topics

### Client Background and Challenges

  - [Aftershoot: Photography-focused company with multiple stakeholders](https://fathom.video/share/UPAJ-ZGoGjHEsibYrfH92c3HR3dQ86xA?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [Very hands-on, detail-oriented approach slowing down content production](https://fathom.video/share/UPAJ-ZGoGjHEsibYrfH92c3HR3dQ86xA?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [Multiple POCs (4+) involved in content approval process](https://fathom.video/share/UPAJ-ZGoGjHEsibYrfH92c3HR3dQ86xA?tab=summary&timestamp=286.0)
  - [Concerns about intent and persona targeting](https://fathom.video/share/UPAJ-ZGoGjHEsibYrfH92c3HR3dQ86xA?tab=summary&timestamp=435.0)
  - [Difficulty showing benefits due to slow publishing rate](https://fathom.video/share/UPAJ-ZGoGjHEsibYrfH92c3HR3dQ86xA?tab=summary&timestamp=253.0)

### Content Strategy and Production

  - [Shifted from product-focused to broader content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/UPAJ-ZGoGjHEsibYrfH92c3HR3dQ86xA?tab=summary&timestamp=481.0)
  - [5-6 blog posts published per month](https://fathom.video/share/UPAJ-ZGoGjHEsibYrfH92c3HR3dQ86xA?tab=summary&timestamp=566.0)
  - [40,000 words produced monthly, but slow approval process](https://fathom.video/share/UPAJ-ZGoGjHEsibYrfH92c3HR3dQ86xA?tab=summary&timestamp=880.0)
  - [Weekly process: 10 outlines submitted, 3-5 articles written](https://fathom.video/share/UPAJ-ZGoGjHEsibYrfH92c3HR3dQ86xA?tab=summary&timestamp=1041.0)
  - [Photos sourced from Pexels/Unsplash or professional photographers](https://fathom.video/share/UPAJ-ZGoGjHEsibYrfH92c3HR3dQ86xA?tab=summary&timestamp=1143.0)

### SEO and Performance

  - [Some published content performing well (reaching top 10)](https://fathom.video/share/UPAJ-ZGoGjHEsibYrfH92c3HR3dQ86xA?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)
  - [New SEO person joined, wanting to reevaluate strategy](https://fathom.video/share/UPAJ-ZGoGjHEsibYrfH92c3HR3dQ86xA?tab=summary&timestamp=697.0)
  - [Client using internal formula for article selection (traffic potential × revenue potential)](https://fathom.video/share/UPAJ-ZGoGjHEsibYrfH92c3HR3dQ86xA?tab=summary&timestamp=411.0)

### Communication and Relationship

  - [Client team doesn't use video in meetings, potentially hindering rapport](https://fathom.video/share/UPAJ-ZGoGjHEsibYrfH92c3HR3dQ86xA?tab=summary&timestamp=1227.0)
  - [Marcel (GrowthX) meeting with Rashid (client) on Friday to discuss process](https://fathom.video/share/UPAJ-ZGoGjHEsibYrfH92c3HR3dQ86xA?tab=summary&timestamp=826.0)
  - [Need to build trust and streamline approval process](https://fathom.video/share/UPAJ-ZGoGjHEsibYrfH92c3HR3dQ86xA?tab=summary&timestamp=1286.0)

### Tools and Processes

  - [Migrated from Content OS to Google Sheets for client preference](https://fathom.video/share/UPAJ-ZGoGjHEsibYrfH92c3HR3dQ86xA?tab=summary&timestamp=941.0)
  - [Content OS slightly outdated but still relatively accurate](https://fathom.video/share/UPAJ-ZGoGjHEsibYrfH92c3HR3dQ86xA?tab=summary&timestamp=1381.0)

## Next Steps

  - [David to send updated Google Sheets to Ehtisham](https://fathom.video/share/UPAJ-ZGoGjHEsibYrfH92c3HR3dQ86xA?tab=summary&timestamp=1381.0)
  - [Team to continue pushing for faster approvals and publishing](https://fathom.video/share/UPAJ-ZGoGjHEsibYrfH92c3HR3dQ86xA?tab=summary&timestamp=1413.0)
  - [Explore ways to automate photo sourcing process](https://fathom.video/share/UPAJ-ZGoGjHEsibYrfH92c3HR3dQ86xA?tab=summary&timestamp=1143.0)
  - [Marcel to discuss streamlining process with Rashid in upcoming meeting](https://fathom.video/share/UPAJ-ZGoGjHEsibYrfH92c3HR3dQ86xA?tab=summary&timestamp=826.0)
  - [Darrell to follow up with David about strategy approach](https://fathom.video/share/UPAJ-ZGoGjHEsibYrfH92c3HR3dQ86xA?tab=summary&timestamp=1352.0)
